description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface. The grooves reveal a lighter, marbled stone texture, while the rest of the block is a deep, solid black, creating a striking striped pattern. The block is thick and robust, with clean, sharp edges and a flat top, making it suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. The grooves are deep enough to be visually prominent but do not penetrate the entire thickness of the block. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the contrast between the grooved and solid areas. There are no visible signs of wear, markings, or engravings, giving the block a modern and well-maintained appearance.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on top, creating a bold striped pattern of black and marbled stone. The sides are smooth and unmarked, giving it a modern, robust look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat face with horizontal grooves and alternating black and marbled stone stripes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the grooves and the vertical alignment of the stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped pattern and the block's thickness.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the vertical grooves and the alternating color bands.
attribute_location_context: modern urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained with sharp edges.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
